claim_boundary: Planner fixtures prove deterministic eligibility/blocker outputs. They do not mutate circuits, submit hardware jobs, or prove hardware improvement.

benchmark_gates: hardware result-pack verifier for any raw-count replay claim
focused mitigation regression tests before circuit-path integration
plan.claim_boundary: Planner output is an eligibility contract only. It does not mutate circuits, submit hardware jobs, prove improved hardware performance, or broaden DLA/GUESS claims without benchmark and raw-count evidence.
required_evidence: raw counts for every mitigated circuit
noise-scaled symmetry observable table for GUESS
